calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-18-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday, March 18, 2015 in Department 525:
Danisha McCall, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as propria Persona with witness Yoland Duree'lyles.
Angela Sanz, Appellant/Defendant appears in Propria Persona with witness Pamela McCall.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn. Danisha McCall testifies on her behalf and responds to questions from Judge Pro Tem Stumpf. The following Unmarked evidence is introduced: dental expenses, copy of work's check stub, medical bills, hospital release, witnesses(neighbor)statements.

Angela Sanz testifies on her own behalf and responds to Judge Pro Tem Stumpf. The following Unmarked evidences are introduced: pictures of Vandalized the car, instant gram, witness letter.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence returned to the parties by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Robert J. Stumpf, Jr.; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-10-2015 Judgment Entered
